name: STUDIO
description: Tokyos no-code web-design platform — responsive editor, CMS and public REST API for content sync.

seo.title: STUDIO — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: STUDIO: Tokyos no-code web-design platform — responsive editor, CMS and public REST API for content sync.

when_to_use: Responsive no-code website built in Tokyo's STUDIO editor
CMS-powered marketing site with REST API for content sync
Japanese startup landing page designed and published without code
Content-heavy site with STUDIO CMS updated by non-technical team
Campaign microsite designed visually and deployed instantly

pros: Built-in CMS plus public REST API
Growing outside Japan with English docs
cons: Pricing in yen confuses global buyers
review.verdict: A serious Webflow challenger from Tokyo with designer-grade output, if you invest in the learning curve.
review.best_for: Designers wanting pixel-perfect responsive sites and CMS without Webflow lock-in
review.not_for: Teams needing heavy e-commerce or the largest template and integration ecosystem
